Description: Annual electrical panel inspection and thermal imaging scan
TechnicianNotes: All panels within normal thermal range. Tightened loose connections on Panel B3-14. Replaced two aging breakers as preventive measure.

Description: Chilled water supply temperature running 4°F above setpoint
TechnicianNotes: Found clogged strainer on chiller CHW-02. Cleaned strainer and replaced gaskets. Verified supply temp returned to 44°F setpoint.

Description: Intermittent power dips on floors 10-14 reported by tenants
TechnicianNotes: Traced to failing capacitor bank on main switchgear. Replaced capacitor bank. Monitoring for 48 hours showed stable power quality.

Description: Steam leak detected in mechanical room, building heating capacity reduced by 40%
TechnicianNotes: Corroded elbow joint on 4-inch steam main in MR-2. Replaced fitting and 6ft of corroded pipe. Root cause: age (pipe original to 1978 construction). Recommended full steam main survey.

Description: Quarterly hot water system inspection and flush
TechnicianNotes: Flushed both HW tanks. Tank #2 showing increased sediment buildup vs last quarter. Anode rod at 60% life remaining. Recommend replacement at next PM cycle.

Description: Electrical meter reporting flat zero readings for 6+ hours
TechnicianNotes: Initial investigation: meter communication board may have failed. Parts on order. Building power confirmed operational via manual readings.

Description: Electricity consumption spike detected — 3x normal baseline for overnight period
TechnicianNotes: Investigating possible stuck relay on HVAC economizer. Economizer damper found fully open during unoccupied hours. Temporary manual override applied.
